ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Continued To Sep-19-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Judi White to appear on September 19, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why responses to the probate examiner's notes have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status For Closoing Estate
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Continued To May-11-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Judi White (via court call) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it is still looking for a petition for final distribution. Ms. White stated that it is taking longer than expected, that everything is done except the final tax return, that it is with her tax person now and that she expects to have this completed in 30-60 days. The Court stated that it will continue the status on closing the estate to May 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and that if the petition for final distribution is not ready she must file a petition for approval of status of administration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)
